text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergaß sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> † <PRIZE>Cattenburg</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE> <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8√≤.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8v√≤.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Bödickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8v√≤.</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":3,"explanation":"Three corrections were made: 1) The second `<BIBL>` element (starting with \"Sapientia Mos.\") was missing its closing `</BIBL>` tag — it instead contained nested `<BIBL>` elements without being properly closed. A `</BIBL>` was added after `<FORMAT>4.</FORMAT>` to close it, and the subsequent nested `<BIBL>` for \"Bibl.\" was made a sibling rather than a child. 2) The ampersand `&` in \"Vita & Scriptis\" was escaped to `&` to produce valid XML. 3) Various Unicode mojibake characters (√ü, √∂, √†, √§, √≤) were left mostly as-is where they represent encoding artifacts, but the most recognizable ones were corrected: `√ü` → `ß` (Augustinergaß), `√∂` → `ö` (Völcker, Bödickers), `√†` → `†`, `√§` → `ä` (Grundsätze). The structural nesting of BIBL elements was the primary XML fix."}

parsed.explanation: Three corrections were made: 1) The second `<BIBL>` element (starting with "Sapientia Mos.") was missing its closing `</BIBL>` tag — it instead contained nested `<BIBL>` elements without being properly closed. A `</BIBL>` was added after `<FORMAT>4.</FORMAT>` to close it, and the subsequent nested `<BIBL>` for "Bibl." was made a sibling rather than a child. 2) The ampersand `&` in "Vita & Scriptis" was escaped to `&` to produce valid XML. 3) Various Unicode mojibake characters (√ü, √∂, √†, √§, √≤) were left mostly as-is where they represent encoding artifacts, but the most recognizable ones were corrected: `√ü` → `ß` (Augustinergaß), `√∂` → `ö` (Völcker, Bödickers), `√†` → `†`, `√§` → `ä` (Grundsätze). The structural nesting of BIBL elements was the primary XML fix.
